司令官さま。お仕事おつかれさまです。<br>こちら、頂き物のお菓子がありますので:
Lord Commander, thank you for your hard work today.
I have some sweets I was given. Would you like to share them with me?
以前治療した患者さんからいただいたんです。<br>こういうお礼はしなくてもいいと:
I received them from a former patient.
I always tell them they don't need to give me gifts, but they insist.
私にとっては、元気になった姿を見せてもらうだけで<br>十分にうれしいのですけど:
For me, just seeing them healthy again is more than enough to make
me happy...
司令官さま？ その指！ 事務仕事の間に紙で切られたのですね。<br>治療しますの:
Lord Commander, your finger! You got a paper cut? I'll treat it—show
me, quick!
ふう、これでよし、と……大げさでもいいんです。<br>前線基地の皆さんが元気でい:
Phew, that should do it. Maybe I'm overdoing it, but seeing everyone
at Frontline Base healthy makes me happiest.
